prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南理工大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第27名、2022年第25名、2023年第26名、2024年第30名、2025年第31名、2026年第 32名，近年排名略有下滑但仍稳居全国前35，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要因校园偷拍事件引发舆论关注，可能对部分考生报 考意愿产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第87位（评价「一般」），短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平；2021–2025年均无投档线断档或暴跌记录，录取稳定性较好；第五轮学科评估A-及以上9个：轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程A、材料科学与工程A、化学工程与技术A、环境科学与工程A、建筑学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A- 、管理科学与工程A-。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在202 4–2026年持续高热推荐，华南理工大学作为传统工科强校受益明显；福建省2026年高考总人数约267900人，按近年物理类占比约76%估算，物理类考生约20.4万人， 较2025年19.2万人增加约6.2%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；工科实力突出，与计算机类、电子信息、电气等热门专业高度契合。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势表现、2026年考生规模显著增加（+6.2 %）、招生计划仅微扩1人、学校声誉负面影响有限等因素，预计2026年物理类录取位次将在2025年3867名基础上继续小幅前移（竞争加剧）。预测最低位次约3846名，区间3346–4 346名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4517 → 4859 → 5191 → 5579 → 3867. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of moving backward (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of about 1062 places; however, in 2025, it moved significantly forward to 3867, a sharp drop of 1712 places compared to 2024, reflecting a clear rebound in the popularity of this university's Physics Category in Fujian. The 2025 ranking of 3867 is the best admission ranking in the past five years. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province: 84 in 2021, 86 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 87 in 2024, 81 in 2025, and 82 in 2026. Compared to 2024, 2025 reduced by 6 students, and 2026 slightly expanded by 1 student (+1.2%) compared to 2025, with a very small expansion that has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 27th in 2021, 25th in 2022, 26th in 2023, 30th in 2024, 31st in 2025, and 32nd in 2026. Although its ranking has slightly declined in recent years, it remains firmly among the top 35 nationally, making it a top-tier engineering powerhouse in China. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly due to a campus peeping incident that attracted public attention, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (evaluation 'average'), with short video exposure at a moderately low level. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission line breaks or sharp drops, indicating good admission stability. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 9 disciplines rated A- or above: Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, and South China University of Technology, as a traditional engineering powerhouse, benefits significantly. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Fujian Province is approximately 267,900. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 76%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 204,000, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 192,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. Its strong engineering capabilities align well with popular majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the significant forward shift in rankings in 2025, the notable increase in the number of examinees in 2026 (+6.2%), the minimal expansion of the enrollment plan by only 1 student, and the limited negative impact of the university's reputation, it is expected that the admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move slightly forward (intensified competition) from the 2025 ranking of 3867. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3846, with a range of 3346–4346.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3346–4346, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3346), focus on aiming for Tier 1 AI Top Talent Class and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4346), use Tier 3 Engineering Pilot Classes as safety options while striving for Tier 2 majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation. Given South China University of Technology's strong engineering capabilities, it is recommended to prioritize major directions related to the university's A-level disciplines (Light Industry, Food, Materials, Chemical Engineering, Environment).

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次长期窄幅震荡、2026年扩招8.7%幅度较大、考生规模增加约6.2 %等因素，扩招对竞争的缓解作用略大于考生增加带来的压力，预计2026年历史类录取位次较2025年1178名小幅后移。预测最低位次约1254名，区间1066–1442名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1164 → 1292 → 1158 → 1304 → 1178. Over the past five years, it fluctuated narrowly between 1158 and 1304, showing a pattern of 'oscillating stability' with no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 ranking of 1178 is at the historical median level. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province: 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 23 in 2025, and 25 in 2026. In 2026, there is an increase of 2 students (+8.7%) compared to 2025, a relatively significant expansion that may alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the top 35 nationwide. Although it excels in engineering, as a comprehensive university it still holds strong appeal for liberal arts students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly due to a campus peeping incident that has drawn public attention, which may slightly suppress some students' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (rated 'average'), with moderate to low exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission cutoff drops or crashes, indicating good admission stability. However, majors such as Law, Economics, and Journalism & Communication, relying on the university's 985 platform, still have certain appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language/Literature had popularity ratings of 'recommended' to 'divergent wait-and-see' from 2024 to 2026; Journalism & Communication saw a rebound in popularity after a 'clearly discouraged' rating in 2023. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province, estimated at about 24% of total examinees, is approximately 64,000, an increase of about 6.2% from 60,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger examinee pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the long-term narrow fluctuation of History Category rankings, the significant 8.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the approximately 6.2% increase in examinee numbers, the mitigating effect of enrollment expansion on competition slightly outweighs the pressure from increased examinees. It is predicted that the 2026 admission ranking for History Category will slightly shift backward compared to the 2025 ranking of 1178. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1254, with a range of 1066–1442.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1066–1442, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1066), prioritize aiming for Law (Outstanding Legal Class) and Accounting; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1442), use Tier 3 majors like Business English and Administrative Management as safety options. South China University of Technology has relatively limited liberal arts major choices, so it is advisable to prioritize applied fields such as Law and Economics based on personal interests and career plans.
